hints.roadmap: Read ROADMAP.md first — it's the source of truth for what task is next
hints.teaching-style: Hands-on first: write/edit a real script, explain concepts through code, not lecture-first
hints.session-flow:
1. Check ROADMAP.md for current task
2. Build something concrete (small script)
3. Explain concepts via the code
4. Update ROADMAP.md when done
5. Keep sessions tight — one script/concept cluster per session
